nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 39. North northeast wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely after 10am. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 51. East northeast wind 12 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Wednesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Rain showers before 7pm, then showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy. Low around 43, with temperatures rising to around 45 overnight. East southeast wind 13 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between three quarters and one inch possible.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before 1pm, then a chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 62. South southwest wind 12 to 18 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

nws.name: Thursday Night
nws.shortForecast: Chance Light Rain then Partly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain before 7pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 40. North northeast wind 7 to 14 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Friday
nws.detailedForecast: Rain likely and a chance of thunderstorms after 7am. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 59. Northeast wind 13 to 17 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Rain likely and a slight chance of thunderstorms before 1am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 32. Northwest wind 14 to 17 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph.

nws.name: Saturday
nws.detailedForecast: Partly sunny, with a high near 49. Northwest wind 17 to 24 mph, with gusts as high as 35 mph.

nws.name: Saturday Night

nws.name: Sunday

nws.name: Sunday Night
